title: Rustomjee Group Holdings Services is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Rustomjee Group Holdings Services is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
We at Rustomjee Group Holdings Services are looking for an experienced Senior Property Advisor based out of Allahabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Rustomjee Group Holdings Services:
Rustomjee Group Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rustomjee Group Holdings Services!
